subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Man has four standards to which he refers in the ascertainment of truth—the report of the senses, the verdict of reason, tradition or testimony, and inspiration.
subcodes.subjects: @four methods of acquiring knowledge, @limits of the intellect, @The Holy Spirit, @intuition; inspiration, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
